claim_boundary: Single-founder internal process evidence. This is not an independent customer pilot, a causal productivity study, or evidence of measured time or cost savings.

public_product_evidence.description: Governed MVP implementation: 8,816 added lines across 83 files and a 54-case acceptance suite.
Working TEMPO explanation and delivery evidence.
Read-back public main revision used for this derived summary.

limitations: The three workspaces include recovery and replay. Their 13 readiness blocks are not 13 independent business decisions, and their 79 events are not 79 unique work items.

The source ledgers remain local and are not published because the product and governance repositories are deliberately separated. The hashes make this derived record stable but do not let a public reader independently replay the private ledgers.
The dogfood run used earlier TEMPO baselines, including 4afc6a3 and the 4a73350 product target, rather than the final 7d320b5 release.
Understand Video media receipts are fixture-mode and authoritative=false. They are technical product evidence, not authoritative TEMPO receipts.
The case demonstrates that TEMPO changed one real development workflow. It does not establish customer demand, adoption, causal productivity impact, or savings.
